title: Lock-In Risk Needs More Researchers. Here's Where to Start
summary: Lock-In Risk Needs More Researchers. Here's Where to Start
whyItMatters: Epistemic status : slightly outdated ideas, only a shallow interpretation of many areas, a somewhat arbitrary taxonomy, and posted because I can't prioritise spending more time on this but think it should be public. Lock-in risk research is neglected and potentially very high impact. I’ve done some thinking about the threat models for lock-in over the last…
